column1: # Baseline producer fingerprints — `sskm-produce --digest` on the sanitized genomes.
# These pin the BIT-EXACT output of the super-k-mer producer (FileSkmerator / SkmerManipulator)
# on real data. Any monothread optimization of the producer must keep these unchanged; the
# benchmark/scripts/producer/producer_bench.sh harness re-computes and diffs against this file (chr21 is the
# dev signal, celegans the final verdict). Regenerate ONLY if the producer's output semantics change
# on purpose (then update tests/km/skmerator_digest.cpp golden values too).
# Captured from the reference build: clang-18 -O3 -march=native (Release), commit baseline of branch dev.
